Sure — I'll set up the continuous task now.

[CREATE_CONTINUOUS name="deconv-bench" work_dir="/tmp/robyx-test-workspace/deconv"]
[CONTINUOUS_PROGRAM]
{
  "objective": "Drive the deconvolution benchmark p95 below 500 ms.",
  "success_criteria": ["p95 latency < 500 ms on the reference image set"],
  "constraints": ["Must not regress visual quality metrics."],
  "checkpoint_policy": "every 3 steps",
  "context": "Working from branch continuous/deconv-bench off main.",
  "first_step": {"number": 1, "description": "Profile the current pipeline to find the dominant hotspot."}
}
[/CONTINUOUS_PROGRAM]
